feat: migrate from raw psycopg to async SQLAlchemy + Alembic

- Replace psycopg raw SQL with async SQLAlchemy ORM \(AsyncSession, create_async_engine\)
- Add declarative models: User, EmailVerificationToken with relationships and partial index
- Add Alembic migration system with initial migration for existing tables
- Rewrite repository layer to use SQLAlchemy queries with session injection
- Rewrite service layer to async with transaction management \(commit in service\)
- Rewrite route handlers to async with Depends\(get_session\) DI
- Replace deprecated @app.on_event\("startup"\) with lifespan context manager
- Update Dockerfile to run alembic upgrade head before uvicorn
- Add .gitignore for Python, Node.js, IDE, env files

EOF
